response.overview: Approach was created through iterative, realtime video processing and chance layering of diegetic sound. I have for years done live processing as a way of embodying my experience of moving through the world, with the organic nature of the processing creating a resonance that invites viewers to feel the work rather than viewing a narrative. Our experiences are filtered through layers of memories, anticipations, sensations, and thoughts. My abstraction through video synthesis is a more accurate representation of moments in my world.
response.title: APPROACH
